---

## Overview

> Deep Research Agent is an AI research system that searches seven trusted sources in parallel, cross-validates results, and generates structured reports with real citations. Using a multi-agent architecture and Gemini 3, it identifies consensus, contradictions, and knowledge gaps in real time.

**Deep Research Agent** is an advanced web application system engineered by **Karthik Idikuda**. Built with Express.js.

<br/>

## System Architecture

```mermaid
graph TD;
    A["Browser Client"] -->|"HTTPS"| B["Frontend"];
    B -->|"Component Render"| C["Interactive UI Layer"];
    C -->|"API"| D["Express.js Server"];
    D --> E[(Database)];

    style A fill:#120024,stroke:#d2a8ff,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
    style B fill:#1a0036,stroke:#d2a8ff,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
    style C fill:#24004d,stroke:#d2a8ff,stroke-width:1px,color:#fff
```

<br/>

## Project Structure

```
Deep-Research-Agent/
  .env.example
  .gitignore
  LICENSE
  README.md
  package-lock.json
  package.json
  vercel.json
  client/
    index.html
    package-lock.json
    package.json
    postcss.config.js
  src/
    server.js
```

<br/>

  <code>axios</code>  <code>uuid</code>  <code>cheerio</code>  <code>cors</code>  <code>express</code>  <code>ws</code>  <code>@google/generative-ai</code>  <code>concurrently</code>  <code>dotenv</code>
